name: Valentine Brownie Hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (325 degrees F for glass dish).
2. Line a 13 inch by 9 inch baking pan with foil, extending over the edges to form handles.
3. Grease the foil.
4. Melt margarine and chocolate in a large microwave-safe bowl on high (100 percent power) for 2 minutes or until melted.
5. Stir in sugar until well blended.
6. Add eggs and vanilla; mix thoroughly.
7. Stir in flour and nuts until well combined.
8. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out with fudgy crumbs. Do not overbake.
10. Let cool in the pan for about 30 minutes before cutting.
11. Lift brownies out of the pan using foil handles and place them inverted on the back of the pan.
12. Carefully remove the foil, then invert onto a cutting board.
13. Cut into heart shapes with a cookie cutter.
14. Place half of the brownies on individual dessert plates.
15. Top each with about 1/2 cup strawberries and 1/3 cup whipped topping.
16. Cover remaining brownies over the strawberries.
17. Serve immediately. Makes 10 to 12 heart-shaped brownies or 5 to 6 servings.
